title: Virawan Yawapongsiri
compiled_truth: Virawan Yawapongsiri is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-05 to 2002-02-13), Virawan Yawapongsiri sent 8 and received 136 emails, totalling 144 interactions. Top correspondents: [Andrew Lewis](people/andrew-lewis) (3), [S  Shively](people/s-shively) (2), [M  Love](people/m-love) (2), [C  Giron](people/c-giron) (1), [Prices](people/prices-intelligencepress) (1). Mailbox folders observed: central, deleted_items, inbox.
